evals.prompt: Bootstrap a roadmap (README has ## Brief with Vision and Audience filled in)
evals.expected_output: Skill reads Brief from README, proposes milestones without asking about vision or audience, presents draft roadmap for approval, writes roadmap.md and milestone stub PRDs on approval.
assertions: Skill reads README.md before generating anything
Skill extracts Vision and Audience from ## Brief section without AskUserQuestion
Skill proposes milestones derived from the Vision content
Skill presents draft roadmap and asks for approval before writing files
.orchestra/roadmap.md written after approval
roadmap.md contains ## Milestones materials table with at least one row
roadmap.md contains ## Success Criteria section
roadmap.md contains ## Context section
roadmap.md contains ## References section linking to ADR-000
At least one milestone stub PRD written to .orchestra/work/{slug}/prd.md
Milestone stub PRD frontmatter has status: draft
Milestone stub PRD body instructs user to run /orchestra-plan

evals.expected_output: Roll-up view of all milestones and their deliverable-level progress. No files modified.
assertions: Skill reads .orchestra/roadmap.md
Skill reads each milestone PRD listed in roadmap materials table
Report shows milestone name and current status
Report shows deliverable count and progress for each milestone
Skill does not write or modify any files

evals.expected_output: Identifies the first incomplete milestone, lists what is not done, and suggests what to tackle next.
assertions: Skill identifies the first milestone that is not Done
Skill lists items from that milestone marked Not Started
Skill suggests which item to tackle next
Skill does not modify any files
